parameters.name: query
parameters.value: site:sam.gov SETA intelligence engineering support services pre-solicitation 2025 2026 NAICS 541715

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: site:sam.gov C5ISR SIGINT EW engineering support services solicitation pre-solicitation Army 2026 NAICS 541715 541330

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ft_opportunity_signal (
  signal_id, title, agency, unit_org, horizon, naics,
  estimated_value, due_date, posted_date,
  source_id, external_url, signal_strength, confidence,
  recommended_action, solution_path, active, reviewed
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.signal_key }}',
  '{{ $json.title }}',
  '{{ $json.agency }}',
  '{{ $json.unit_org }}',
  '{{ $json.horizon }}',
  '{{ $json.naics }}',
  {{ $json.estimated_value !== null && $json.estimated_value !== undefined ? $json.estimated_value : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.due_date ? "'" + $json.due_date + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.posted_date ? "'" + $json.posted_date + "'" : 'CURRENT_DATE' }},
  '{{ $json.source_id }}',
  '{{ $json.source_url || $json.signal_key }}',
  {{ $json.signal_strength || 70 }},
  {{ $json.confidence || 60 }},
  '{{ $json.recommended_action || 'TRACK' }}',
  '{{ $json.solution_path || '' }}',
  true,
  false
)
ON CONFLICT (signal_id) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  agency = EXCLUDED.agency,
  unit_org = EXCLUDED.unit_org,
  horizon = EXCLUDED.horizon,
  naics = EXCLUDED.naics,
  estimated_value = EXCLUDED.estimated_value,
  due_date = EXCLUDED.due_date,
  posted_date = EXCLUDED.posted_date,
  external_url = EXCLUDED.external_url,
  signal_strength = EXCLUDED.signal_strength,
  confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
  recommended_action = EXCLUDED.recommended_action,
  solution_path = EXCLUDED.solution_path,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE ft_opportunity_signal.source_id != 'gda-intel'

INSERT INTO ft_signal_source (source_id, name, source_type, band, active, notes)
VALUES
  ('govtribe-web', 'GovTribe Web Feed', 'intelligence', 'formal', true, 'Federal opportunity data via Tavily web search')
ON CONFLICT (source_id) DO UPDATE SET
  active = true
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_signals, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE source_id != 'gda-intel') as external_signals, MAX(updated_at) as last_updated FROM ft_opportunity_signal WHERE active = true
